mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chunk_bge_m3 (kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (CAST(#{kbId} AS uuid), CAST(#{docId} AS uuid), #{content}, #{metadata}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata, embedding, created_at, updated_at FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE id = CAST(#{param1} AS uuid)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE id = CAST(#{param1} AS uuid)
mapper.select: SELECT id, kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata, embedding, created_at, updated_at FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE doc_id = CAST(#{docId} AS uuid) ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT id, kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata, embedding, created_at, updated_at FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE kb_id = CAST(#{kbId} AS uuid)
SELECT id, kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata, embedding, created_at, updated_at FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE kb_id = CAST(#{kbId} AS uuid) AND LOWER(content) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{artifactId}), '%')

SELECT id, kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata, embedding, created_at, updated_at FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE id IN
CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = #{tableName} ORDER BY ordinal_position ASC
mapper.update:
UPDATE chunk_bge_m3
kb_id = CAST(#{et.kbId} AS uuid),
doc_id = CAST(#{et.docId} AS uuid),
content = #{et.content},
metadata = #{et.metadata},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = CAST(#{et.id} AS uuid)
mapper.select: SELECT id, kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata, embedding, created_at, updated_at FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE kb_id = CAST(#{kbId} AS uuid) ORDER BY embedding <-> #{vectorLiteral}::vector LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata, embedding, created_at, updated_at FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE kb_id = CAST(#{kbId} AS uuid) AND LOWER(content) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{artifactId}), '%') ORDER BY embedding <-> #{vectorLiteral}::vector LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata, embedding, created_at, updated_at FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE kb_id = CAST(#{kbId} AS uuid) AND LOWER(content) LIKE LOWER(#{queryLike}) ORDER BY CASE WHEN LOWER(content) = LOWER(#{queryText}) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, POSITION(LOWER(#{queryText}) IN LOWER(content)) ASC, LENGTH(content) ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata, embedding, created_at, updated_at FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE kb_id = CAST(#{kbId} AS uuid) AND LOWER(content) LIKE LOWER(#{queryLike}) AND LOWER(content) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{artifactId}), '%') ORDER BY CASE WHEN LOWER(content) = LOWER(#{queryText}) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, POSITION(LOWER(#{queryText}) IN LOWER(content)) ASC, LENGTH(content) ASC LIMIT #{limit}
